  • Uses of Hdf5Group in global.thalion.ttio.providers

    Methods in global.thalion.ttio.providers that return Hdf5Group
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Hdf5Group
    Hdf5Provider.tryUnwrapHdf5Group(StorageGroup group)
    Phase 2 (post-M91): if group is an HDF5-backed StorageGroup, return the underlying Hdf5Group; otherwise return null.
    Methods in global.thalion.ttio.providers with parameters of type Hdf5Group
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static StorageGroup
    Hdf5Provider.adapterForGroup(Hdf5Group group)
    v0.7 M44: wrap a raw Hdf5Group in the provider adapter so callers holding the low-level handle (AcquisitionRun, SpectralDataset) can hand it off as a protocol StorageGroup.
